sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34975" key="e)na/racis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνάραξις</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰρ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n34975.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beating</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τυμπάνων</foreign> prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.56e</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
